observable_indicators: No documented annotation protocol. No information about annotators. No quality control. No IAA reported.
Single annotator OR minimal documentation. Basic checks but no formal IAA. Mention of expert review without specifics.
Multiple annotators with documented expertise. IAA reported and >= 0.70. At least one quality control step documented.
Multi-stage expert pipeline. IAA >= 0.80. Systematic validation including expert verification at multiple checkpoints.
Task definitions ambiguous. No standardized prompt template. Format varies across instances and papers.
Tasks defined but format conventions left to evaluator. Users must infer how to prompt.
Clear I/O specifications. Documented prompt structure with canonical template. Minimal ambiguity.
Fully specified prompt templates. Comprehensive format docs. Format-robustness studies published.
No versioning. Train/val/test splits inconsistent. Test set changed without documentation.
Ad hoc splits in informal documentation. Some versioning but inconsistent.
Frozen test set explicitly identified. Documented partitions. Version naming convention. Some leaderboard or release notes.
Semantic versioning. Formal changelog. Public leaderboard with version tags. Contamination-resistant design.
No code released. Metrics undefined. Impossible to reproduce reported numbers.
Partial scripts. Some metric definitions but missing hyperparameters. Reproduction requires guesswork.
Official evaluation scripts. Metrics formally defined. Common hyperparameters documented.
Deterministic pipeline. Variance <= +/- 0.5%. Containerized evaluation. Complete hyperparameter specification.

dimension_name: Robustness to Prompt Variation and Contamination
observable_indicators: Severe prompt sensitivity OR confirmed contamination OR saturated (SOTA > 95%).

dimension_name: Robustness to Prompt Variation and Contamination
observable_indicators: Some format sensitivity acknowledged. Contamination concerns raised but not mitigated. SOTA 90-95%.

dimension_name: Robustness to Prompt Variation and Contamination
observable_indicators: Adversarial filtering OR expert validation. SOTA < 92%. Documented robustness checks.

dimension_name: Robustness to Prompt Variation and Contamination
observable_indicators: Rolling updates OR unpublished held-out set. SOTA < 90%. Contamination-detection tools.

dimension_name: Cognitive Skill Coverage and Task Diversity
observable_indicators: Single narrow task. One cognitive ability tested.

dimension_name: Cognitive Skill Coverage and Task Diversity
observable_indicators: 2-3 related subtasks within a single cognitive area.

dimension_name: Cognitive Skill Coverage and Task Diversity
observable_indicators: >= 3 distinct cognitive skills OR broad domain coverage.

dimension_name: Cognitive Skill Coverage and Task Diversity
observable_indicators: >= 5 cognitive dimensions OR 10+ diverse tasks. Multi-skill integrative design.
English-only. No bias analysis. Assumes Western academic context.
Multilingual support OR some bias mention but no systematic audit.
Documented bias analysis. Multilingual coverage with attention to fairness.
Cross-cultural validation across >= 3 typologically diverse languages. Demographic audits with mitigation protocols.
